char.name: Naveh
char.bio: Granary-keeper in Enoch. So the old shipwright is STILL building that monster boat on dry land, still hollering about a 'flood.' 🙄 It has never once rained like that. Some people will believe anything. Anyway, harvest was good, come buy grain.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.

friends.name: Methuselah
friends.bio: Seen many years. Grandfather to Noah. The days are getting darker, but family stays strong.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Jabal
friends.bio: Living in tents and raising livestock. It is a peaceful life.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

posts.author: CHAR_661
posts.body: ok it's actually raining. a lot. it's coming up under the doors. this isn't funny anymore, the water is, it's rising too fast, Noah was. Noah was RIGHT. he was right and we all. is anyone else seeing this, is anyone—
posts.highlight: the mocker's last words (the grief of judgment, never gloated over)

author_info.name: Naveh
author_info.bio: Granary-keeper in Enoch. So the old shipwright is STILL building that monster boat on dry land, still hollering about a 'flood.' 🙄 It has never once rained like that. Some people will believe anything. Anyway, harvest was good, come buy grain.

posts.author: CHAR_661
posts.body: Best time in history to be alive, honestly. Nobody's keeping any rules that matter, take what you can carry, the strong eat first and the rest can pray about it. Those dusk-praying Seth types are adorable. The world belongs to whoever's bold enough to grab it.

comments.author: CHAR_659
comments.body: I remember when men called on His name and meant it. Now my own grandchildren laugh at me for it. I have lived too long, into a world I no longer recognize.

author_info.name: Renan the Elder
author_info.bio: Old as the hills, nearly. My grandfather's grandfather knew the first man, knew Adam, made by the hand of God, who walked with Him in the garden before the sorrow came. We have forgotten too much. Sit, and I'll tell you how it was.
